# Fanout

Fanout is a social media API and automation platform for developers and agencies. It lets you publish content to 9 social media platforms simultaneously with a single API call.

## What Fanout Does
Fanout connects to Twitter/X, LinkedIn, Facebook, Instagram, TikTok, YouTube, Pinterest, Reddit, and Threads. When you send one POST request to the Fanout API with your content, it distributes the post to all selected platforms in parallel, handles OAuth token management, retries failed posts, and collects analytics.

## Who It's For
- Developers building apps that need social sharing
- Agencies managing multiple client social accounts
- SaaS products with "share to social" features
- Marketers who want to schedule and automate posts across all platforms

## How It Compares to Ayrshare
Fanout is a direct alternative to Ayrshare. Key differences: flat-rate pricing (no per-post or per-profile fees), a built-in AI content generation tool, a conversational setup agent that auto-configures your account, and white-label options for agencies.

## Pricing
- Starter: $49/month — 3 social profiles, 5 platforms
- Agency: $199/month — 25 profiles, all 9 platforms, AI drafts
- White-Label: $399/month — unlimited profiles, custom domain

## API
The Fanout REST API accepts a POST request with your content and platform list. It returns post IDs and URLs for each platform. Authentication uses API keys per profile. See https://fanout.digital/docs for full documentation.

## Key Features
- Post to 9 platforms simultaneously
- OAuth connection management (connect once, post forever)
- AI-powered content variants (platform-optimized drafts)
- Post scheduling with cron-based delivery
- Analytics collection (impressions, likes, engagement)
- Webhook callbacks on post status
- White-label API for agencies

## Contact
Website: https://fanout.digital
